summary: Project uses React with location tracking and user mode state management.
architectural_notes: React useState used for locationEnabled (boolean, default true) and userMode (string, default 'normal')

existing_features.title: Add a location enable/disable toggle to the Profile page that persists the `locationEnabled` boolean state (defaulting to `true`) in localStorage and reflects the current permission status. When disabled, suppress any location-dependent features (e.g., nearby buddies map, presence broadcasting). Sync this state with the existing `useLocationPermission` hook and the `LocationPermissionModal` component.

Add a `userMode` state (defaulting to `"normal"`) to the SportContext and expose a setter so any page can switch modes. Define at least two modes: `"normal"` and `"buddy_finder"`. Display the current mode in the Profile page with a segmented control or dropdown to switch between modes. Persist the selected mode in localStorage.

new_feature_requests.summary: User mode switching (normal and other modes)
